gist.headline: Watering the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just did its daily rounds, updating the health metrics for all community apps in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the repository documentation.
gist.impact: Keeps the app showcase and greenhouse metrics up-to-date with the latest health statuses.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the monitor robot doing daily chores in a digital greenhouse, checking on the health of various code-plants (representing apps).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The robot holds a tiny clipboard with checkmarks. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The robot holds a tiny clipboard with checkmarks. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
